pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run as Java 8 code, failing to utilize Java 11 features or comply with the migration goal.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JaCoCo Maven plugin to a version compatible with Java 11 bytecode.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JaCoCo versions (like 0.7.5) cannot instrument or analyze classes compiled with Java 11, causing runtime errors during test coverage execution.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Inject API dependency to replace javax.inject.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed Java EE modules from the JDK; javax.inject is no longer available on the classpath by default, requiring the explicit Jakarta dependency for compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Jakarta Annotation API dependency to replace javax.annotation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 11 removed Java EE modules from the JDK; javax.annotation is no longer available on the classpath by default, requiring the explicit Jakarta dependency for compilation.
